class.name: ASBridgeState
class.brief_description: LimboState with integrated Ability System support.
class.description: A [LimboState] that integrates with Ability System. Provides automatic event dispatching on state transitions and event listening for automatic transitions. Can require specific tags to be present before entering, and dispatches AS events on [code]_enter[/code], [code]_exit[/code], and [code]_update[/code].

method.name: can_enter_state
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if this state can be entered (checks required tags if [member check_tags_on_enter] is enabled).

method.name: get_check_tags_on_enter
method.description: Returns whether to check required tags before entering.

method.name: get_enter_events
method.description: Returns the array of events to dispatch on state enter.

method.name: get_exit_events
method.description: Returns the array of events to dispatch on state exit.

method.name: get_listen_events
method.description: Returns the array of events to listen for (trigger transition).

method.name: get_required_tags
method.description: Returns the array of tags required to enter this state.

method.name: get_transition_event
method.description: Returns the event that triggers automatic transition out of this state.

method.name: get_update_events
method.description: Returns the array of events to dispatch during state update.

method.name: set_check_tags_on_enter
method.description: If [code]true[/code], validates required tags before allowing state entry.

method.name: set_enter_events
method.description: Sets the events to dispatch when entering this state.

method.name: set_exit_events
method.description: Sets the events to dispatch when exiting this state.

method.name: set_listen_events
method.description: Sets the events to listen for. When detected, triggers [code]event_finished[/code].

method.name: set_required_tags
method.description: Sets the tags required for this state to be entered.

method.name: set_transition_event
method.description: Sets the event that triggers automatic transition from this state.

method.name: set_update_events
method.description: Sets the events to dispatch during each [code]_update[/code] call.
